description: Historic first Americas Region World Championship Qualifier. Five countries compete: USA, Canada, Jamaica, Brazil, and Argentina. Premier Bowls USA national championship event crowning US champions in men's and women's singles and pairs. All play in round-robin format. Singles matches to 21 shots; pairs play 18 ends. Participants must be US citizens who won their divisional playdown.
